variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11841 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11841 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11841 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 170.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 133.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 100.5 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 3/8"-16UNF, Height 1 (H1): 158.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 130.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 12.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1891 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11841
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1891 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11841
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1891 premium axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
